abilities.name: Evolutionary Call
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when you play Meganium from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokemon, you may search your deck for up to 3 Pokemon cards, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

tests.name: evolutionary_call_search_deck
tests.description: Test that Evolutionary Call can search deck for up to 3 Pokemon

tests.name: evolutionary_call_effect_id
tests.description: Test that effect ID is correctly formatted
